title: Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back (junior novelization)

'''''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back''''', also referred to as '''''Star Wars Trilogy: The Empire Strikes Back''''', is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] junior novel written by [[Ryder Windham]], based on a story by [[George Lucas]] and a screenplay by [[Leigh Brackett]] and [[Lawrence Kasdan]]. It adapts the [[1980]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], and it was first published in [[October]] [[2004]] by [[Scholastic]].<ref name="Amazon" />

The novel was later collected in ''[[Star Wars Trilogy: Collector's Edition]]'' ([[2005]]), ''[[Star Wars Boxed Set: Episodes I–VI]]'' ([[2007]]), and ''[[Star Wars: Classic Trilogy]]'' ([[2014]]). A revised, [[canon]] edition of the novel, [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (paperback novel)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'']], was published in 2017.

==Publisher's summary==
''A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away....''

''An Empire grows stronger. A rebellion is threatened. A young apprentice learns from a wise master. An identity is revealed. The journey takes a dark turn.''<ref name="Amazon" />
